Mobile Computing and Software Architecture

Paper code: COMPX202-26B (HAM)

Paper title: Mobile Computing and Software Architecture

Learning outcomes

  • Design and implement mobile applications using appropriate architectures.
  • Apply software development methodologies and testing frameworks.
  • Use version control and collaborative development tools effectively.

Assessment

AssessmentWeightDue dateDescription
Assignment One15%14 August 2026GUI development project
Test One25%20 August 2026In-class written test
Assignment Two15%25 September 2026Mobile app milestone
Assignment Three20%22 October 2026Final mobile application
Test Two25%8 October 2026Final written test

Staff

  • Dr Alex Example - Paper Coordinator - alex.example@waikato.ac.nz
  • Jamie Tutor - Tutor - jamie.tutor@waikato.ac.nz

Timetable of topics

WeekTopic
Week 1Course introduction and Java GUI recap
Week 2Software development methodologies
Week 3Version control and testing frameworks
Week 4Mobile architectures

Key dates

  • Teaching period: 13 July 2026 - 8 November 2026
  • Exam period: N/A (100% internal assessment)
